constraints: Only the nine frozen instance features and expert summaries are visible to the selector.
Development uses seeds 121000-141029; confirmation uses disjoint seeds 151000-171029.
Confirmation is evaluated only after the final candidate is frozen and never feeds the same evolution run.
The development oracle remains report-only and is not an input to fitness or prompts.
The OpenCode Go key was unavailable before cohort start; the complete three-run cohort therefore uses the declared DeepSeek fallback and must not be merged with a primary-provider cohort.
Historical actor values such as research_agent_eoh remain historical evidence and are not silently rewritten.

do_not_do: change the proxy gate after seeing results
expose confirmation or oracle costs to evolution
report the 2.5107 percent development oracle as achieved performance
